rule.name: Malware User Agent
rule.description: Detects suspicious user agent strings used by malware in proxy logs
rule.query:
{
  "selection": {
    "c-useragent": [
      "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; rv:53.0) Gecko/20100101 Chrome /53.0",
